---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for ClipJoin
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to add.

## Problem it solves

What problem does this solve? Is it related to an existing issue?

## Proposed solution

How would you like this feature to work? Describe the desired behavior and user experience.

## Alternatives considered

Have you thought of alternative approaches?

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples that might help clarify the idea.

## Related to

- Closes #(issue number) (if applicable)
